homepage.heroSubline: Expert remodelers serving Boise and surrounding areas. Crafting beautiful, functional spaces that last.
aboutText: Idaho Custom Bath started a decade ago with a simple goal: to provide homeowners in the Boise area with high-quality remodeling services they could rely on. We saw a need for contractors committed to doing the job right, the first time.

Our approach is simple: listen to our clients, understand their vision, and execute with precision. We believe in open communication, transparent pricing, and a commitment to exceeding expectations on every project.
We're proud to be a part of the Boise community. We source materials locally whenever possible, support local businesses, and strive to contribute to the beauty and value of our neighborhoods.

valueProps.title: Experienced Craftsmen
valueProps.description: Our team consists of skilled professionals with years of experience in all aspects of home remodeling.

valueProps.title: Quality Materials
valueProps.description: We use only premium materials from trusted suppliers to ensure lasting beauty and durability.

valueProps.title: Transparent Pricing
valueProps.description: We provide detailed, upfront estimates with no hidden fees or surprises.

valueProps.title: Customer Satisfaction
valueProps.description: We're committed to your complete satisfaction, from initial consultation to project completion.

homepage.ctaSubline: Schedule a free consultation and let's discuss your remodeling project.

services.name: Bathroom Remodeling
services.shortDescription: Transform your bathroom into a luxurious and functional space.
services.description: We handle all aspects of bathroom remodeling, from minor updates to complete overhauls. Whether you're dreaming of a spa-like retreat or a more efficient family bathroom, we have the expertise to bring your vision to life. We start with a detailed consultation to understand your needs and preferences, then develop a customized design plan that maximizes space and functionality. Our skilled craftsmen handle all aspects of the project, including demolition, plumbing, electrical work, tiling, and fixture installation. We use only high-quality materials to ensure lasting beauty and durability, and we pay close attention to every detail to ensure a flawless finish. Boise homes often experience hard water issues, so we can also advise on water softening and filtration solutions to protect your new fixtures and plumbing.

faq.question: How long does a bathroom remodel typically take?
faq.answer: The timeline varies depending on the scope of the project, but most bathroom remodels take between 2-4 weeks.

faq.question: Do I need to move out during the remodel?
faq.answer: It's generally recommended to avoid using the bathroom being remodeled during the construction phase to ensure safety and efficiency.

faq.question: What type of permits are required for bathroom remodeling?
faq.answer: Depending on the extent of the remodel, permits may be required for plumbing and electrical work. We handle all permit applications on your behalf.

services.name: Kitchen Remodeling
services.shortDescription: Create the kitchen of your dreams with our expert remodeling services.
services.description: The kitchen is the heart of the home, and we're passionate about creating kitchens that are both beautiful and functional. We offer a full range of kitchen remodeling services, from minor updates to complete renovations. Whether you're looking to update your cabinets and countertops, install new appliances, or completely reconfigure your layout, we have the expertise to bring your vision to life. We understand the unique challenges of remodeling kitchens in older Boise homes, such as dealing with uneven floors and outdated plumbing. We work closely with you to develop a design that meets your needs and budget, and we handle all aspects of the project, from demolition to installation. We can also help you select energy-efficient appliances and lighting to reduce your energy consumption and save money on your utility bills. With Boise's hot summers in mind, we can also optimize your kitchen layout for better ventilation and cooling.

faq.question: What is the average cost of a kitchen remodel?
faq.answer: The cost of a kitchen remodel varies depending on the size and scope of the project, as well as the materials and appliances you choose. We provide detailed estimates upfront so you know exactly what to expect.

faq.question: How long will my kitchen be out of commission during the remodel?
faq.answer: We understand that being without a kitchen can be inconvenient, so we work efficiently to minimize disruption. Most kitchen remodels take between 4-8 weeks.

faq.question: Can you help me choose the right appliances for my kitchen?
faq.answer: Yes, we can help you select appliances that are both energy-efficient and aesthetically pleasing. We have partnerships with leading appliance manufacturers and can offer competitive pricing.

services.name: Basement Finishing
services.shortDescription: Transform your unfinished basement into a comfortable and functional living space.
services.description: Unlock the hidden potential of your basement with our expert finishing services. We can transform your unfinished basement into a comfortable and functional living space, adding valuable square footage to your home. Whether you're looking to create a home theater, a guest bedroom, a home office, or a playroom for the kids, we have the expertise to bring your vision to life. We understand the unique challenges of basement finishing in Boise, such as dealing with moisture and radon. We use moisture-resistant materials and proper ventilation techniques to ensure a healthy and comfortable living environment. We also offer radon mitigation services to protect your family from harmful gas. We'll help you navigate Boise's building codes and permits to ensure your basement finishing project is compliant and safe.

faq.question: How much does it cost to finish a basement?
faq.answer: The cost of finishing a basement varies depending on the size and scope of the project, as well as the materials you choose. We provide detailed estimates upfront so you know exactly what to expect.

faq.question: Do I need a permit to finish my basement?
faq.answer: Yes, a permit is required to finish a basement in Boise. We handle all permit applications on your behalf.

faq.question: How long does it take to finish a basement?
faq.answer: Most basement finishing projects take between 4-8 weeks, depending on the complexity of the design.

services.name: Deck Construction
services.shortDescription: Extend your living space outdoors with a custom-built deck.
services.description: Enjoy the beautiful Boise weather with a custom-built deck. We design and build decks of all shapes and sizes, using high-quality materials that are designed to withstand the elements. Whether you're looking for a simple platform deck or a multi-level masterpiece, we can create a deck that meets your needs and budget. We understand the challenges of building decks in Boise, such as dealing with the hot summers and cold winters. We use weather-resistant materials and proper construction techniques to ensure your deck will last for years to come. We'll help you choose the right materials for your deck, such as wood, composite, or vinyl. We also offer a variety of deck features, such as railings, stairs, benches, and lighting. Given Boise's wildfire risk, we can also advise on fire-resistant decking materials.

faq.question: How much does it cost to build a deck?
faq.answer: The cost of building a deck varies depending on the size, materials, and features you choose. We provide detailed estimates upfront so you know exactly what to expect.

faq.question: Do I need a permit to build a deck?
faq.answer: Yes, a permit is typically required to build a deck in Boise. We handle all permit applications on your behalf.

faq.question: What type of materials are best for a deck in Boise?
faq.answer: The best materials for a deck in Boise are those that are weather-resistant and durable, such as composite decking or treated lumber.

services.name: Exterior Painting
services.shortDescription: Protect and beautify your home with our professional exterior painting services.
services.description: Give your home a fresh new look with our professional exterior painting services. We use high-quality paints and proven techniques to protect your home from the elements and enhance its curb appeal. We understand the unique challenges of exterior painting in Boise, such as dealing with the hot summers, cold winters, and occasional wildfire smoke. We use paints that are specifically designed to withstand these conditions and protect your home from fading, cracking, and peeling. We also offer a variety of color options to choose from, so you can find the perfect shade to match your style. Before painting, we carefully prepare the surface by cleaning, scraping, and priming. We also repair any damage to the siding or trim. Our experienced painters pay close attention to detail to ensure a flawless finish that will last for years to come. We're familiar with the common siding types in Boise, from older wood siding in the North End to newer vinyl siding in the suburbs.

faq.question: How much does it cost to paint the exterior of my home?
faq.answer: The cost of painting the exterior of your home varies depending on the size, condition, and type of siding. We provide detailed estimates upfront so you know exactly what to expect.

faq.question: How long does it take to paint the exterior of a house?
faq.answer: Most exterior painting projects take between 3-7 days, depending on the size and complexity of the job.

faq.question: What type of paint is best for the exterior of my home?
faq.answer: The best type of paint for the exterior of your home is a high-quality acrylic latex paint that is designed to withstand the elements.

services.name: Window Replacement
services.shortDescription: Improve energy efficiency and enhance your home's aesthetics with new windows.
services.description: Upgrade your home with new, energy-efficient windows. We offer a wide selection of window styles and materials to choose from, and we provide expert installation services. We understand the importance of energy efficiency in Boise, where summers are hot and winters are cold. We offer windows that are designed to reduce heat transfer and save you money on your energy bills. We also offer a variety of window styles to choose from, including double-hung, casement, sliding, and picture windows. We'll help you choose the right windows for your home, based on your needs and budget. Our experienced installers will ensure that your new windows are properly installed and sealed, preventing drafts and leaks. We're familiar with the diverse architectural styles in Boise, from the historic homes in the North End to the modern homes in Harris Ranch, and we can recommend window styles that complement your home's design.

faq.question: How much does it cost to replace my windows?
faq.answer: The cost of replacing your windows varies depending on the size, style, and material. We provide detailed estimates upfront so you know exactly what to expect.

faq.question: How long does it take to replace windows?
faq.answer: Most window replacement projects take between 1-3 days, depending on the number of windows being replaced.

faq.question: What type of windows are the most energy-efficient?
faq.answer: The most energy-efficient windows are those with a low-E coating and argon gas fill.

services.name: Flooring Installation
services.shortDescription: Upgrade your floors with our professional flooring installation services.
services.description: Enhance the beauty and functionality of your home with new flooring. We offer a wide selection of flooring options, including hardwood, laminate, tile, and carpet, and we provide expert installation services. We understand the unique challenges of flooring installation in Boise, such as dealing with uneven subfloors and moisture. We use proper preparation techniques to ensure that your new flooring is properly installed and will last for years to come. We also offer a variety of flooring styles to choose from, so you can find the perfect option to match your style and budget. For Boise homes with pets and kids, we can recommend durable and easy-to-clean flooring options. Our experienced installers pay close attention to detail to ensure a flawless finish. Considering Boise's dry climate, we can also advise on hardwood flooring options that are less prone to cracking and warping.

faq.question: How much does it cost to install new flooring?
faq.answer: The cost of installing new flooring varies depending on the type of flooring, the size of the room, and the complexity of the installation. We provide detailed estimates upfront so you know exactly what to expect.

faq.question: How long does it take to install new flooring?
faq.answer: Most flooring installation projects take between 1-5 days, depending on the size and complexity of the job.

faq.question: What type of flooring is best for my home?
faq.answer: The best type of flooring for your home depends on your lifestyle, budget, and personal preferences. We can help you choose the right flooring for your needs.

serviceAreas.content:
Idaho Custom Bath is proud to offer its premier bathroom remodeling services to the residents of Boise, Idaho. We understand that your bathroom is a personal sanctuary, and we're committed to transforming it into a space that reflects your style and meets your needs. From simple upgrades to complete overhauls, our team of experienced professionals is dedicated to providing exceptional craftsmanship and unparalleled customer service. We use only the highest quality materials and employ innovative design techniques to create stunning and functional bathrooms that you'll love for years to come.

Whether you're dreaming of a luxurious spa-like retreat or a modern, efficient space, Idaho Custom Bath has the expertise to bring your vision to life. We handle every aspect of the remodeling process, from initial design and material selection to demolition, construction, and final finishing touches. Our goal is to make the entire experience as seamless and stress-free as possible, ensuring that you're completely satisfied with the results. We are committed to excellence in every project we undertake.

We are fully licensed and insured, and we stand behind our work with a comprehensive warranty. Contact Idaho Custom Bath today to schedule a consultation and discover how we can transform your Boise bathroom into the bathroom of your dreams.
serviceAreas.localContext: Boise, the capital of Idaho, is a vibrant city known for its outdoor recreation, thriving arts scene, and friendly community. We understand the unique character of Boise homes and tailor our services to complement the local aesthetic.

serviceAreas.content:
Idaho Custom Bath extends its exceptional bathroom remodeling services to the growing community of Meridian, Idaho. As one of the fastest-growing cities in the state, Meridian is home to families and individuals who appreciate quality and value. We are dedicated to providing Meridian residents with top-notch bathroom remodeling solutions that enhance their homes and lifestyles. Our team of skilled designers and craftsmen works closely with you to create a bathroom that is both beautiful and functional.

From updating fixtures and flooring to completely redesigning your bathroom layout, Idaho Custom Bath has the expertise to handle any project, big or small. We understand the importance of creating a space that meets your specific needs and preferences. Whether you're looking for a modern, minimalist design or a more traditional, luxurious feel, we can help you achieve your vision. We believe in transparent communication and fair pricing, ensuring that you're completely informed and confident throughout the entire process.

We take pride in our commitment to customer satisfaction and strive to exceed your expectations with every project. Contact Idaho Custom Bath today to learn more about our bathroom remodeling services in Meridian and how we can transform your bathroom into a space you'll love.

reviews.name: Sarah M.
reviews.text: Idaho Custom Bath transformed our outdated kitchen into a modern masterpiece! The team was professional, communicative, and meticulous. We especially appreciated their attention to detail and their willingness to work with us to create a space that truly reflects our style. The project was completed on time and within budget. Highly recommend!

reviews.name: John B.
reviews.text: We hired Idaho Custom Bath to remodel our master bathroom, and we're very happy with the results. The quality of the workmanship is excellent, and the team was always respectful of our home. There were a couple of minor hiccups along the way, but they were quickly resolved. Overall, a great experience.

reviews.name: Emily K.
reviews.text: Idaho Custom Bath did an amazing job finishing our basement. The space is now a functional and comfortable living area that our family loves. The team was professional, reliable, and easy to work with. They helped us navigate the permitting process and ensured that everything was up to code. We highly recommend them!

reviews.name: David L.
reviews.text: We couldn't be happier with our new deck! Idaho Custom Bath designed and built a beautiful and functional outdoor living space that we'll enjoy for years to come. The team was professional, efficient, and detail-oriented. They used high-quality materials and paid close attention to every detail. A fantastic job!

reviews.name: Jessica P.
reviews.text: Idaho Custom Bath did a great job painting the exterior of our house. The team was professional, courteous, and efficient. They used high-quality paints and took the time to properly prepare the surface. The finished product looks fantastic, and we've already received compliments from our neighbors.

reviews.name: Michael S.
reviews.text: We replaced all of the windows in our home with Idaho Custom Bath, and we're very pleased with the results. The new windows are energy-efficient and have significantly reduced our energy bills. The installation team was professional and efficient, and they cleaned up after themselves thoroughly. A great investment!
